subject: Error importing in M
body:
Hi, I am getting the "No micrographs or tilt series found to match these
settings" when adding a data source (.settings file) in M:

[image: image.png]
The tilt series was imported and processed without issues in Warp, after
which I exported subtomos and refined in RELION. Now I want to further
refine in M and am encountering this error. I compared with another
.settings file that works in M and could not find any obvious problem.

Any ideas what's going on here?

Thanks a lot!

--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto
